modules.fallback: Switch Quantity of motion and mass to audio plus two flip cards with one sentence each.
modules.reading_paragraph: Quantity of motion and mass: Momentum is a physical quantity that includes both mass and velocity, characterizing the "quantity of motion" of an object. Key detail: The momentum (p) of an object is the product of its mass (m) and its velocity (v), represented by the formula p = mv. Key detail: The momentum of an object is equal to the mass of the object times the velocity of the object (p = m • v). Key detail: Unlike kinetic energy, momentum depends equally on an object’s mass and velocity.
